$comment: Catalog of the static/trending audio tracks in this folder. The AI reads `description`, `mood`, and `tags` to pick the track that best fits the video's vibe. `file` is the exact file name in assets/audio/. Each clip is cut to the video length (~5s) at render time, starting from `startSec`.

tracks.file: ASTRONOMIATUZELITY x ABVIRAL NEON SHUFFLE DANCE #shorts #viral.mp3
tracks.title: Astronomia (Tuzelity shuffle / Coffin Dance)  neon shuffle edit
tracks.description: High-energy EDM 'Astronomia' beat, the viral Tuzelity/Coffin-Dance shuffle anthem. Hard hype build and drop used for flex montages and over-the-top reaction edits.
tracks.goodFor: loud confident product hype, 'wait till you see this' reveals, energetic excited reactions

tracks.title: Dancing Makes Everything Better
tracks.description: Upbeat, bouncy feel-good dance track. Light, playful and happy  the 'everything just got easier' celebration vibe.
tracks.goodFor: wholesome wins, 'problem solved' relief, cheerful relatable everyday moments

tracks.file: Interstellar theme - tiktok version cover by dorian marko.mp3
tracks.title: Interstellar Theme (TikTok cover)  Hans Zimmer
tracks.description: Epic, swelling cinematic piano-and-organ theme from Interstellar. Builds from quiet awe to a goosebumps climax. Used for dramatic, inspiring, 'this changes everything' moments.
tracks.goodFor: big product reveals, ambitious/visionary framing, awe-struck or motivational reactions

tracks.title: Just Can't Prove It (suspicious meme audio)
tracks.description: The 'I know what you did... I just can't prove it' suspicious meme sound. Paranoid, side-eye, comedic distrust energy.
tracks.goodFor: skeptical 'is this too good to be true' takes, deadpan suspicious reactions, comedic distrust

tracks.file: Tamar Braxton - Let Me Know (Official Video) ft. Future.mp3
tracks.title: Tamar Braxton  Let Me Know ft. Future
tracks.description: Smooth, laid-back R&B groove. Cool, confident and vibey  the effortless, 'I got this' flex without the noise.
tracks.goodFor: effortless confident flexes, sleek/premium products, chill relatable cool reactions

tracks.file: The ONLY 1010 movies  Tyler, The Creator - GONE, GONE  THANK YOU #edit.mp3
tracks.title: Tyler, The Creator  GONE, GONE / THANK YOU (edit)
tracks.description: Moody, stylish Tyler, The Creator edit audio  bittersweet yet cool. The aesthetic-edit sound for emotional-but-confident, glow-up flex montages.
tracks.goodFor: aesthetic glow-up edits, bittersweet-but-cool transformations, stylish emotional flexes

tracks.title: Dramamine  slowed + reverb (Modest Mouse)
tracks.description: Dreamy, slowed-and-reverb ambient guitar. Calm, peaceful, nostalgic and a little melancholic  the 'quiet, slow, at-peace' vibe.
tracks.goodFor: calm relaxed reactions, peaceful wholesome moments, nostalgic or reflective vibes
